productDisplayName: Nike Men's Vapor Knit Grey Short
description: CompositionGrey training shorts made of 96% polyester and 4% spandex, with the lining made of 100% polyester and gusset made of 95% polyester and 5% spandex, engineered with Dri-Fit technology, has an elasticated waist with a drawstring, side pockets, stitch detailing on the side hem and nike swoosh logo printed on the left leg above the hemFittingComfortWash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not use softeners Do not bleach Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Tumble dry low Do not iron or dry clean Stylish to the T, these polyester shorts from nike are designed with Dri-Fit technology to keep you fresh and comfortable while you sweat it out at the gym or on the trail. The broad waistband sits snugly, while you can further customise the fit with the drawstring. Team it with Nike Sports tees and shoes for that smart, sporty look.
